_comment: BT-25 Dual Revolution — self-contained (supplies packsPerBox). Premium pricing ($140 box). Ultimate Rare and Ultra Rare draw from the same hit pool (2 combined per box, split 1:1). Pull rates are placeholder — update when community data is available.

Ultimate Rare._comment: ~1 per box — same hit pool as Ultra Rare; 2 combined per box

Ultra Rare._comment: ~1 per box — same hit pool as Ultimate Rare; 2 combined per box
